---
title: Market calendars
---

`q.calendar` contains exchange-session and market-time operations. Functions
require an explicit ISO 10383 market identifier; qrt never assumes one market.

```python
closed_days = q.calendar.non_trading_days_after(
    prices.index.to_series(),
    exchange="XNYS",
)
```

An early close remains a trading session. The function counts only closed
calendar dates between consecutive sessions and validates every input date
against the selected exchange calendar.
